positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos.tptp
1. bred_back(heck_cattle) [input(axiom)]
2. resembles(heck_cattle,aurochs) [input(axiom)]
3. animal(heck_cattle) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0,X1] : ((bred_back(X0) & animal(X0) & resembles(X0,X1)) => extinct(X1)) [input(axiom)]
6. extinct(aurochs) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~extinct(aurochs) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ~extinct(aurochs) [flattening 7]
9. ! [X0,X1] : (extinct(X1) | (~bred_back(X0) | ~animal(X0) | ~resembles(X0,X1))) [ennf transformation 5]
10. ! [X0,X1] : (extinct(X1) | ~bred_back(X0) | ~animal(X0) | ~resembles(X0,X1)) [flattening 9]
11. bred_back(heck_cattle) [cnf transformation 1]
12. resembles(heck_cattle,aurochs) [cnf transformation 2]
13. animal(heck_cattle) [cnf transformation 3]
15. ~resembles(X0,X1) | ~bred_back(X0) | ~animal(X0) | extinct(X1) [cnf transformation 10]
16. ~extinct(aurochs) [cnf transformation 8]
17. ~bred_back(heck_cattle) | ~animal(heck_cattle) | extinct(aurochs) [resolution 15,12]
18. ~animal(heck_cattle) | extinct(aurochs) [forward subsumption resolution 17,11]
19. extinct(aurochs) [forward subsumption resolution 18,13]
20. $false [forward subsumption resolution 19,16]
% SZS output end Proof for pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
